language.description: This will affect the language of the app, but also the language of geographic information and the expected answers.
language.title: Select your language

reminder-opt-in.description: Never miss a Daily Challenge by enabling notifications.
reminder-opt-in.title: Enable Daily Challenge Reminders

daily-challenge.title: Daily Challenge
daily-challenge.description: Play today's geography puzzle and keep your streak alive.

learn.title: Learn
learn.description: Browse through the geographic knowledge base.

complete.completed-description: Nice one. Your streak is now {{streak}}.
complete.failed-description: You can try again with a new challenge tomorrow.

navigation-confirm.title: Leave this screen?
navigation-confirm.description: Any unsaved changes may be lost.

region.title: Region
region.description: Focus the session on a map region.

question-formats.title: Question formats
question-formats.description: Choose which formats can be used for prompts.

answer-formats.title: Answer formats
answer-formats.description: Choose which formats can be used for answers.

answer-difficulty.title: Difficulty
answer-difficulty.description: Choose how flag and text answers are presented.

question-limit.title: Question limit
question-limit.description: Set how many questions the session can include.

validation.formats-must-be-different: Question and answer formats must be different.

leave-confirm.title: Leave training?
leave-confirm.description: Your training progress will be lost.

not-found.title: Country not found
not-found.description: This country could not be found in the geography data.

map.title: Map
map.description: Study countries from their position on the map.

flags.title: Flags
flags.description: Review national flags at your own pace.

countries.title: Countries
countries.description: Browse countries and their key facts.

capitals.title: Capitals
capitals.description: Memorize capital cities country by country.

theme.description: Choose how GeoPoto looks on this device.
theme.title: Theme

adaptive-difficulty.title: Adaptive Difficulty
adaptive-difficulty.description: Prioritize training questions you often miss.

reset.label: Reset Adaptive Difficulty History
reset.confirm-description: This clears the local results used to prioritize training questions. Adaptive Difficulty will stay enabled.

haptic-feedback.title: Haptic feedback
haptic-feedback.description: Play subtle vibrations for supported interactions.

daily-challenge-reminder.title: Daily Challenge Reminder
daily-challenge-reminder.description: Get a local notification for the Daily Challenge on this device.
daily-challenge-reminder.time-disabled-label: Turn reminders on to change the time.
daily-challenge-reminder.permission-denied: Notifications are disabled for GeoPoto. Enable them in device settings before turning reminders on.
